message:
fix(share): apply symlink-safe metadata check to bundle export config loader

Continuation of symlink safety hardening: replace .exists() with
symlink_metadata() + is_file() check in load_bundle_export_config()
for the chunk config path, ensuring symlinked config files cannot
redirect bundle export parameters to attacker-controlled locations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
